back_translation: 'And in the seventh month, on the first of the month, a holy assembly shall be for you; all work of labor you shall not do; it shall be for you a day of trumpet-blast.'
'And you shall offer a burnt offering for a pleasing aroma to the LORD: one young bull, one ram, seven lambs sons of a year, unblemished.'
'And their grain offering — fine flour mixed with oil, three tenths for the bull, two tenths for the ram.'
'And one tenth for the one lamb, for the seven lambs.'
'And one male goat, a sin offering, to make atonement for you.'

'In addition to the monthly burnt offering and its grain offering, and the regular burnt offering and its grain offering, and their drink offerings according to their ordinance, for a pleasing aroma, a fire offering to the LORD.'
'And on the tenth of this seventh month, a holy assembly shall be for you; and you shall afflict your souls; all work you shall not do.'
'And you shall offer a burnt offering to the LORD, a pleasing aroma — one young bull, one ram, seven lambs sons of a year, unblemished they shall be for you.'
'And their grain offering — fine flour mixed with oil, three tenths for the bull, two tenths for the one ram.'
'A tenth, a tenth, for the one lamb, for the seven lambs.'
'One male goat, a sin offering, in addition to the sin offering of atonements and the regular burnt offering and its grain offering and their drink offerings.'
'And on the fifteenth day of the seventh month a holy assembly shall be for you; all work of labor you shall not do, and you shall keep a feast to the LORD seven days.'
'And you shall offer a burnt offering, a fire offering, a pleasing aroma to the LORD — thirteen young bulls, two rams, fourteen lambs sons of a year, unblemished they shall be.'
'And their grain offering — fine flour mixed with oil, three tenths for the one bull, for the thirteen bulls, two tenths for the one ram, for the two rams.'
'And a tenth, a tenth, for the one lamb, for the fourteen lambs.'
'And one male goat, a sin offering, in addition to the regular burnt offering, its grain offering and its drink offering.'
'And on the second day, twelve young bulls, two rams, fourteen lambs sons of a year, unblemished.'
'And their grain offering and their drink offerings, for the bulls, for the rams, and for the lambs, by their number, according to ordinance.'
'And one male goat, a sin offering, in addition to the regular burnt offering and its grain offering and their drink offerings.'
'And on the third day, eleven bulls, two rams, fourteen lambs sons of a year, unblemished.'
'And their grain offering and their drink offerings, for the bulls, for the rams, and for the lambs, by their number, according to ordinance.'
'And one male goat, a sin offering, in addition to the regular burnt offering and its grain offering and its drink offering.'
'And on the fourth day, ten bulls, two rams, fourteen lambs sons of a year, unblemished.'
'Their grain offering and their drink offerings, for the bulls, for the rams, and for the lambs, by their number, according to ordinance.'
'And one male goat, a sin offering, in addition to the regular burnt offering, its grain offering and its drink offering.'
'And on the fifth day, nine bulls, two rams, fourteen lambs sons of a year, unblemished.'
'And their grain offering and their drink offerings, for the bulls, for the rams, and for the lambs, by their number, according to ordinance.'
'And one male goat, a sin offering, in addition to the regular burnt offering and its grain offering and its drink offering.'
'And on the sixth day, eight bulls, two rams, fourteen lambs sons of a year, unblemished.'
'And their grain offering and their drink offerings, for the bulls, for the rams, and for the lambs, by their number, according to ordinance.'
'And one male goat, a sin offering, in addition to the regular burnt offering, its grain offering and its drink offerings.'
'And on the seventh day, seven bulls, two rams, fourteen lambs sons of a year, unblemished.'
'And their grain offering and their drink offerings, for the bulls, for the rams, and for the lambs, by their number, according to their ordinance.'
'And one male goat, a sin offering, in addition to the regular burnt offering, its grain offering and its drink offering.'
'On the eighth day, a solemn assembly shall be for you; all work of labor you shall not do.'
'And you shall offer a burnt offering, a fire offering, a pleasing aroma to the LORD — one bull, one ram, seven lambs sons of a year, unblemished.'
'Their grain offering and their drink offerings, for the bull, for the ram, and for the lambs, by their number, according to ordinance.'
'And one male goat, a sin offering, in addition to the regular burnt offering and its grain offering and its drink offering.'

'These you shall offer to the LORD at your appointed times, in addition to your vows and your freewill offerings, for your burnt offerings and for your grain offerings and for your drink offerings and for your peace offerings.'
